exploration_notes: ILM implementation spans three modules: (1) x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/ contains the runtime engine — IndexLifecycleService triggers policy evaluation on cluster state changes and delegates to IndexLifecycleRunner, which uses PolicyStepsRegistry to look up steps and submits ExecuteStepsUpdateTask for cluster state updates. TransportPutLifecycleAction and TransportDeleteLifecycleAction handle CRUD of policies. IndexLifecycleTransition computes state transitions. (2) x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/..
